metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_532
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig. 2b Shank1 is present in PSD fractions
Literal
"By immunoblotting, the Shank1-specific 1356 antibody confirmed the absence of Shank1 protein in the PSD fraction of Shank1 knock-out brains."
Fig-3b Shank1 colocalized with PSD-95. Experimental description: Experiment of biochemistry are made in mouse
Literal from M&M
"The Triton-extracted PSD fraction (PSDI) was purified from the forebrains of individual 2- to 3-month-old mice, as described previously ."
Experiment of immunohistochemistry are made in mouse.
Literal from M&M
"Primary hippocampal cultures were prepared from the brains of individual mouse embryos at embryonic day 18 (E18) to E19 as described previously."
